title: Analytics - Device Release Notes Opened
scenario: Logs when device-specific release notes are viewed, with event counts updating after a few hours and default analytics elements present.
steps: Open the app and navigate to device-specific release notes.
View the release notes for a specific device.
Check the event logs to confirm the event was logged.
Wait a few hours for event counts to update.

Verify the default elements are present for the event: graph for this event, events in last 30 minutes, event count by country, event count by gender, events per session, app version, app build, and app environment.
expected: Event is logged when device-specific release notes are viewed. Event counts update after a few hours. Default elements (graph for this event, events in last 30 minutes, event count by country, event count by gender, events per session, app version, app build, app environment) are present for every event.
